__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Lomekwi Stoneware,The Silver Key,Night Watch,Quantum Foam,Crime and Punishment
|rank=orange
|amount=5
|category=self
|description=Per 1.2k Gaia Tech Pts, Snail ATK +10, Gaia Tech Pts: 60,000/60,000
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Gaia Tech Points]]
